2606.20210.title: Augmenting Game AI with Deep Reinforcement Learning
2606.20210.paper_summary: Immersion in video games depends not only on graphics, audio, and game mechanics, but also on the quality of in-game characters. Producing believable characters, or game AI, remains a significant challenge as behavioral complexity is hard to capture with hand-coded systems. Game AI is a source of immersion and engagement; however, the limitations stemming from the challenges of creating game AI often lead to frustration and the breaking of the illusion of realism within the game. The introduction of machine learning models opens the door to creating more believable, authentic, and relatable characters in games. The promise is that they either learn from interacting with the game, or from player data, to develop true human-like behavior. In this paper, we envision more applications of reinforcement learning for game AI in the future. For this to materialize, current research limitations are prohibitive to broad deployment across game genres. Therefore, we propose a framework for training reinforcement learning models with a set of requirements in mind that are suited towards game AI and game development. We present examples of games with reinforcement learning-augmented game AI and describe the practicalities of deploying player-facing machine learning agents in modern games. Furthermore, we identify bottlenecks and hard problems in these areas, which we believe offer promising research directions to accelerate the adoption of machine learning in game AI for the video game industry.
2606.20210.paper_summary_zh: 沉浸於視頻遊戲不僅依賴於圖形、音效和遊戲機制，還取決於遊戲內角色的質量。製作可信的角色或遊戲人工智慧仍然是一個重大挑戰，因為行為的複雜性很難用手動編碼的系統捕捉。遊戲人工智慧是沉浸感和參與感的來源；然而，創造遊戲人工智慧所面臨的挑戰所帶來的限制，往往導致挫折感並破壞遊戲中的現實主義幻覺。機器學習模型的引入為創造更可信、真實和可關聯的遊戲角色打開了大門。其承諾在於它們要麼通過與遊戲的互動學習，要麼通過玩家數據來發展真正的人類行為。在本文中，我們展望未來強化學習在遊戲人工智慧中的更多應用。為了實現這一目標，當前的研究限制對於在各種遊戲類型中廣泛部署是具有阻礙性的。因此，我們提出了一個訓練強化學習模型的框架，考慮到適合遊戲人工智慧和遊戲開發的一系列要求。我們展示了增強型遊戲人工智慧的強化學習遊戲的例子，並描述了在現代遊戲中部署面向玩家的機器學習代理的實際情況。此外，我們確定了這些領域中的瓶頸和難題，我們相信這些問題提供了有前景的研究方向，以加速機器學習在視頻遊戲產業中的遊戲人工智慧的採用。
2606.20210.author: Alessandro Sestini et.al.
2606.20210.authors: Alessandro Sestini, Joakim Bergdahl, Amir Baghi, Jean-Philippe Barrette-LaPierre, Florian Fuchs, Linus Gisslén
